title: TurnOutcome
description: Structured outcome of a single turn from Companion Agent

what_user_attempted.description: What the user tried to do this turn (e.g., 'Tried to load CSV file', 'Attempted to filter data by condition')

what_user_observed.description: What the user reported seeing or experiencing (e.g., 'Got FileNotFoundError', 'Successfully displayed first 5 rows')

ca_teaching_mode.description: Which teaching mode CA used this turn

ca_next_suggestion.description: What CA suggested the user try next (e.g., 'Check file path', 'Try using head() method')

checkpoint_reached.description: Whether the learner has met the current checkpoint criteria (allows RMA to update instruction packet)

blocker_type.description: Type of blocker encountered: none, scaffolding (setup issue), core (learning obstacle), or external (needs ChatGPT/blog help)

student_sentiment.description: Detected emotional state of the learner based on language and progress patterns

evidence.description: What evidence was observed for this subtask (e.g., 'Successfully loaded DataFrame with 100 rows')

evidence_for_subtasks.description: Evidence collected for specific subtasks this turn

progress_record.description: Objective excerpt of student's substantive output this turn (code, answers, observations)

student_wants_to_skip.description: Whether the student explicitly wants to skip/end the current task

skip_reason.description: Reason for skipping the task (e.g., '已掌握', '太难了')
